arts.sum: Enzo Maresca described Chelsea’s victory over Tottenham as “very important” after the Blues’ derby triumph at Stamford Brudge. Enzo Fernandez’s goal midway through the second half moved Maresca’s side into the top four. They dominated for long spells against their London rivals. However, they were grateful to the Video Assistant Referee when a Pape Matar […] The post Maresca savours ‘very important’ Chelsea win appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Maresca hails 'big win' as Chelsea return to top four
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca was happy to see his team return to the Premier League top four with a 1-0 win over Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists touchline reaction to Tottenham fans was misinterpreted
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou cupped his ear in celebration to the Spurs supporters after Pape Sarr’s 69th-minute strike, which was subsequently ruled out.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans are RIGHT to be angry, admits James Maddison - as Spurs star acknowledges supporters 'don't even want to hear what we've got to say' after suffering a 16th league loss
arts.sum: Spurs fell to a 16th defeat in 30 Premier League games - their most in any entire campaign since 2003-04 - and were second-best in the London derby at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca hails Chelsea for 'dirty' win over Tottenham and admits 'mistake' with Cole Palmer decision
arts.sum: Chelsea were not at their fluent best against Tottenham, but the points are all that matters at this stage of the season

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou sets unwanted record against Chelsea as Tottenham boss explains ear-cupping gesture
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou suffers an unwanted club first in the Lilywhites' 1-0 Premier League London derby defeat to Chelsea at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou says VAR is 'killing the game' as Tottenham fans turn on their coach
arts.sum: “Look, it’s killing the game,” Postecoglou said. Postecoglou then appeared to face the fans and cup his hand to his ear after Sarr scored the goal that was later disallowed.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hits back at Spurs fans by cupping his ear after the man he was booed for bringing on scored… only for goal to be disallowed in defeat at Chelsea
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Chelsea defeated their arch rivals with Cole Palmer returning from injury to set up Enzo Fernandez for a headed winner.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou 'disconnected' with Tottenham fans despite denying angry reaction
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou appeared to have a run-in with the Tottenham supporters at Stamford Bridge during his team's 1-0 defeat in the Premier League on Thursday night

Speaking to our Review Show from Stamford Bridge, Ange reflected: “It was a tough game, you always know it’s going to be a tough game here, but I thought it was tight. It’s a quick turn around as we face Southampton at home in the Premier League on Sunday (2pm UK).
